text_block_list.text:
I'm headed to the library to do some<n>research,
when...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Ever the hard little worker, aren't<n>you? Found
anything useful yet?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, well, it's pretty difficult to<n>understand these
medical textbooks.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Apparently, the cause of motion<n>sickness is...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
To put it simply, it seems to occur due<n>to a
mismatch between the<n>information you receive
from your<n>inner ear and your vision.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Yikes. Is there any way of fixing it?<n>Without doing
anything too risky, of<n>course...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It seems that getting used to it really<n>is the
simplest method.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But... Ugh, the thought of having to<n>endure feeling
sick until I get used to<n>it makes me feel... well, sick.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Well, hello there!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh, um, hi! Do you mind sharing?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Th-this is...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It's the park! Hehe, look at all those<n>children.
They're having the time of<n>their lives.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Um, why are we here exactly?<n>Wouldn't an
amusement park ride be<n>better?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: The... swings?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Ohhh! You're right! They're likelittle rides! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I get it now! With these, I can ease<n>myself into
things!

The motion of the swings shouldn't<n>be too
intense. This'll make the<n>perfect first step!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Thanks for your help! I'll try it right<n>away!
choice_data_list: Try to have fun with it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Well then, let's take a little break. Are<n>you feeling
okay?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I felt nauseous for a second<n>there, but I'm
fine!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
As soon as I start feeling sick, I can<n>just kick out
my legs and stop, after<n>all.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I think I can keep this up for a while.<n>Thank you so
much!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thank goodness.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Still, these swings take me back... I'm<n>the one
pushing the children now, but<n>I remember when I
was the little one<n>going up and down.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
With a big enough push, I felt like I<n>could almost
reach the sky. Hehe, it<n>was thrilling.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, then would you like to play on the<n>swings
together this time? You can sit<n>and I'll push you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
You might not reach the sky, but as<n>they always
say, "Look to the sky<n>and you'll feel like you're
flying!"

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure it'll be super fun, and I<n>won't get sick
either!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Well now! That does sound delightful.<n>But let me
know if you feel sick at all.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I'll support you any way I can! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Thanks!

After a short break, the two of them<n>head to the
swings, smiling with<n>childlike glee as they go.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: You're right! I will!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I don't remember getting sick on<n>swings as a
child... Hehe, I'm gonna<n>swing as hard as I can!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...I got too excited and went<n>overboard. Ugh...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
There, there. Are you okay, dear?<n>Shall I get you
something to drink?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You looked so cute on that swing that<n>I forgot to
stop you. My apologies.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
No, no. That would've been a fool's<n>errand... I've
only got myself to<n>blame.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Let's take a break. You can rest on<n>my lap when
we get back to the<n>dorm.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Here, lean on me. Unless... shall I<n>carry you back?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: N-no, that's okay. Urgh... thank you,<n>though.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sorry for wasting your time.<n>Next time, I'll
be sure to start off nice<n>and slow...

Leaning on Super Creek's shoulder<n>as she totters
along, Sakura Chiyono<n>O heads back to the dorms.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Okay, I will. Why don't you two come<n>along too?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
That sounds great. We can have a<n>nice, relaxing
chat while we swing.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
What a beautiful day... And swinging<n>feels good. I
think I might be able to<n>handle this...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
That's wonderful. I hope you<n>overcome your
motion sickness soon.<n>That way you can ride with
Maruzen<n>again.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! How'd you know all that?! I<n>only mentioned
that I get motion sick<n>easily.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you're so cute when you're<n>flustered. You
know, I can just tell<n>these things.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Maruzen really is a wonderful<n>Umamusume. It's
no wonder you<n>look up to her so much.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Yes! She really is so amazing and<n>lovely and...

Given the chance to talk about<n>Maruzensky,
Sakura Chiyono O lights<n>up with admiration.

And this has the added bonus of<n>taking all her
attention away from her<n>motion sickness...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh wow... I feel totally fine. That's<n>amazing!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I was so absorbed in our<n>conversation that I
hardly noticed the<n>swinging!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It's like they always say! "Fall into a<n>daze and
you'll never be fazed."

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: You did so well today! You didn't get<n>sick at all!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Thanks to you two!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Worrying about getting sick might<n>actually be
making it worse. I should<n>distract myself as much
as possible.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
If I can master this, I might be able to<n>handle cars
too! I can see a light at<n>the end of this tunnel!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. ♪

It might not be a permanent solution,<n>but Sakura
Chiyono O has found a<n>small glimmer of hope for
her car ride<n>dream.
